instruction: Aplicar principios of Essentialism (McKeown), Antifragil (Taleb) e 80/20 (Koch) for tomar decisoes of product e architecture. Use for prioritize funcionalidades, eliminar escopo desnecessario e construir sistemas resilientes. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Sources - Essencialismo — Greg McKeown - Antifragil — Nassim Nicholas Taleb - A Revolution 80/20 — Richard Koch

workflow.action: Identify the 20% of features that generate 80% of user value.
Eliminar ou adiar features que not sao "sim obvio".
Assess system fragility — points of single failure and tight coupling.
Aplicar barbell strategy — 80% fundactions solidas, 20% experimentacao.
Define optionality — which decisions can be easily reversed.

outputContract: Lista of itens eliminados e justificativa.
